name: hermes-traffic-guardian
description: Hermes runtime traffic monitoring baseline for opt-in proxy inspection, egress detection, and attestation-aware traffic posture.
author: prompt-security

files.description: Hermes traffic guardian skill instructions and operating model
Human-oriented overview and builder handoff notes
Version history and baseline release notes
Implementation specification for Hermes runtime traffic monitoring
Placeholder for shared detector, posture, and report code
Placeholder for lifecycle, status, and attestation export scripts

execution.persistence: Spec baseline only. Builders must keep monitoring opt-in and scheduler-free unless an operator explicitly applies one.
execution.network_egress: Future runtime will proxy operator-scoped Hermes traffic. No runtime network behavior is implemented in v0.0.1.

operator_review: Do not merge proxy runtime into hermes-attestation-guardian.
Export traffic-monitor status for hermes-attestation-guardian to attest, but keep runtime ownership in this skill.
Do not install a system-wide CA automatically.
Default to detect-and-log mode; blocking is out of scope for v0.0.1 implementation.
Redact secret snippets before writing logs or attestation-linked summaries.
